packages.name: marked
packages.purpose: Parses Markdown chapter text into HTML before sanitizing and rendering.

packages.name: DOMPurify
packages.purpose: Sanitizes generated HTML so user-authored Markdown content is safe to inject.

packages.name: qrcodejs
packages.purpose: Generates QR codes for URL/asset references in page rendering and exports.

packages.name: html2canvas
packages.purpose: Captures rendered DOM pages into bitmap canvases for PDF/image/video export pipelines.

packages.name: jsPDF
packages.purpose: Builds interior, cover, and eBook PDF documents from rendered page canvases.

packages.name: JSZip
packages.purpose: Bundles exported page images into downloadable ZIP archives.

packages.name: gifenc
packages.purpose: Encodes GIF frames for preview and animated GIF export.

packages.name: mp4-muxer
packages.purpose: Muxes encoded video chunks into an MP4 container for export.
